001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.SystemUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.concurrent.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
032
033/**
034 * Serializes POJOs to RDF.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='topic'>Behavior-specific subclasses</h5>
037 * <p>
038 * The following direct subclasses are provided for language-specific serializers:
039 * <ul>
040 *    <li>{@link RdfXmlSerializer} - RDF/XML.
041 *    <li>{@link RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer} - RDF/XML-ABBREV.
042 *    <li>{@link NTripleSerializer} - N-TRIPLE.
043 *    <li>{@link TurtleSerializer} - TURTLE.
044 *    <li>{@link N3Serializer} - N3.
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
049 * </ul>
050 *
051 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
052 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
053
054 * </ul>
055 */
056@SuppressWarnings({
057   "java:S100", // Builder methods use underscore-separated namespacing convention (e.g. n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri, rdfxml_xmlbase) to group related settings by Jena component
058   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth exceeds 5; necessary to participate in the serializer hierarchy
059   "java:S115"  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
060})
061public class RdfSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements RdfMetaProvider {
062
063   // Property name constants
064   private static final String PROP_addBeanTypes = "addBeanTypes";
065   private static final String PROP_addLiteralTypes = "addLiteralTypes";
066   private static final String PROP_addRootProperty = "addRootProperty";
067   private static final String PROP_autoDetectNamespaces = "autoDetectNamespaces";
068   private static final String PROP_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
069   private static final String PROP_juneauBpNs = "juneauBpNs";
070   private static final String PROP_juneauNs = "juneauNs";
071   private static final String PROP_language = "language";
072   private static final String PROP_looseCollections = "looseCollections";
073   private static final String PROP_namespaces = "namespaces";
074   private static final String PROP_useXmlNamespaces = "useXmlNamespaces";
075
076   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
077   private static final String ARG_value = "value";
078   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
079   private static final String ARG_values = "values";
080
081   // Media type and language constants
082   private static final String LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV = "RDF/XML-ABBREV";
083   private static final String MT_TEXT_XML_RDF = "text/xml+rdf";
084
085   /**
086    * Builder class.
087    */
088   @SuppressWarnings({
089      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
090   })
091   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
092
093      private static final Cache<HashKey,RdfSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, RdfSerializer.class).build();
094
095      private static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NS = Namespace.of("j", "http://www.apache.org/juneau/");
096      private static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAUBP_NS = Namespace.of("jp", "http://www.apache.org/juneaubp/");
097
098      boolean addBeanTypesRdf;
099      boolean addLiteralTypes;
100      boolean addRootProperty;
101      boolean disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
102      boolean disableUseXmlNamespaces;
103      boolean looseCollections;
104      String language;
105      Namespace juneauNs;
106      Namespace juneauBpNs;
107      RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat;
108      List<Namespace> namespaces;
109      Map<String,Object> jenaSettings;
110
111      /**
112       * Constructor, default settings.
113       */
114      protected Builder() {
115         super();
116         addBeanTypesRdf = env("Rdf.addBeanTypesRdf", false);
117         addLiteralTypes = env("Rdf.addLiteralTypes", false);
118         addRootProperty = env("Rdf.addRootProperty", false);
119         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = env("Rdf.disableAutoDetectNamespaces", false);
120         disableUseXmlNamespaces = env("Rdf.disableUseXmlNamespaces", false);
121         looseCollections = env("Rdf.looseCollections", false);
122         language = env("Rdf.language", LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV);
123         collectionFormat = env("Rdf.collectionFormat", RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT);
124         juneauNs = DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NS;
125         juneauBpNs = DEFAULT_JUNEAUBP_NS;
126         namespaces = null;
127         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>();
128      }
129
130      /**
131       * Copy constructor.
132       *
133       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
134       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
135       */
136      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
137         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
138         addBeanTypesRdf = copyFrom.addBeanTypesRdf;
139         addLiteralTypes = copyFrom.addLiteralTypes;
140         addRootProperty = copyFrom.addRootProperty;
141         collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
142         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = copyFrom.disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
143         disableUseXmlNamespaces = copyFrom.disableUseXmlNamespaces;
144         juneauBpNs = copyFrom.juneauBpNs;
145         juneauNs = copyFrom.juneauNs;
146         language = copyFrom.language;
147         looseCollections = copyFrom.looseCollections;
148         namespaces = copyFrom.namespaces;
149         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(copyFrom.jenaSettings);
150      }
151
152      /**
153       * Copy constructor.
154       *
155       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
156       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
157       */
158      protected Builder(RdfSerializer copyFrom) {
159         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
160         addBeanTypesRdf = copyFrom.addBeanTypesRdf;
161         addLiteralTypes = copyFrom.addLiteralTypes;
162         addRootProperty = copyFrom.addRootProperty;
163         collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
164         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = ! copyFrom.autoDetectNamespaces;
165         disableUseXmlNamespaces = ! copyFrom.useXmlNamespaces;
166         juneauBpNs = copyFrom.juneauBpNs;
167         juneauNs = copyFrom.juneauNs;
168         language = copyFrom.language;
169         looseCollections = copyFrom.looseCollections;
170         namespaces = copyFrom.namespaces.length == 0 ? null : list(copyFrom.namespaces);
171         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(copyFrom.jenaSettings);
172      }
173
174      /**
175       * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
176       *
177       * <p>
178       * If <jk>true</jk>, then <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
179       * through reflection.
180       *
181       * <p>
182       * When present, this value overrides the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()} setting and is
183       * provided to customize the behavior of specific serializers in a {@link SerializerSet}.
184       *
185       * @return This object.
186       */
187      public SELF addBeanTypesRdf() {
188         return addBeanTypesRdf(true);
189      }
190
191      /**
192       * Same as {@link #addBeanTypesRdf()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
193       *
194       * @param value The value for this setting.
195       * @return This object.
196       */
197      public SELF addBeanTypesRdf(boolean value) {
198         addBeanTypesRdf = value;
199         return self();
200      }
201
202      /**
203       * Add XSI data types to non-<c>String</c> literals.
204       *
205       * <p>
206       * Shortcut for calling <code>addLiteralTypes(<jk>true</jk>)</code>.
207       *
208       * @return This object.
209       */
210      public SELF addLiteralTypes() {
211         return addLiteralTypes(true);
212      }
213
214      /**
215       * Add XSI data types to non-<c>String</c> literals.
216       *
217       * <p>
218       * Shortcut for calling <code>addLiteralTypes(<jk>true</jk>)</code>.
219       *
220       * @param value
221       *    The new value for this setting.
222       * @return This object.
223       */
224      public SELF addLiteralTypes(boolean value) {
225         addLiteralTypes = value;
226         return self();
227      }
228
229      /**
230       * Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
231       *
232       * <p>
233       * When enabled an RDF property <c>http://www.apache.org/juneau/root</c> is added with a value of <js>"true"</js>
234       * to identify the root node in the graph.
235       * <br>This helps locate the root node during parsing.
236       *
237       * <p>
238       * If disabled, the parser has to search through the model to find any resources without incoming predicates to
239       * identify root notes, which can introduce a considerable performance degradation.
240       *
241       * @return This object.
242       */
243      public SELF addRootProperty() {
244         return addRootProperty(true);
245      }
246
247      /**
248       * Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
249       *
250       * <p>
251       * When enabled an RDF property <c>http://www.apache.org/juneau/root</c> is added with a value of <js>"true"</js>
252       * to identify the root node in the graph.
253       * <br>This helps locate the root node during parsing.
254       *
255       * <p>
256       * If disabled, the parser has to search through the model to find any resources without incoming predicates to
257       * identify root notes, which can introduce a considerable performance degradation.
258       *
259       * @param value
260       *    The new value for this setting.
261       * @return This object.
262       */
263      public SELF addRootProperty(boolean value) {
264         addRootProperty = value;
265         return self();
266      }
267
268      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
269      public RdfSerializer build() {
270         return cache(CACHE).build(RdfSerializer.class);
271      }
272
273      /**
274       * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
275       *
276       * <ul class='values'>
277       *    <li><js>"DEFAULT"</js> - Default format.  The default is an RDF Sequence container.
278       *    <li><js>"SEQ"</js> - RDF Sequence container.
279       *    <li><js>"BAG"</js> - RDF Bag container.
280       *    <li><js>"LIST"</js> - RDF List container.
281       *    <li><js>"MULTI_VALUED"</js> - Multi-valued properties.
282       * </ul>
283       *
284       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
285       *    <li class='note'>
286       *       If you use <js>"BAG"</js> or <js>"MULTI_VALUED"</js>, the order of the elements in the collection will get
287       *       lost.
288       * </ul>
289       *
290       * @param value
291       *    The new value for this setting.
292       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
293       * @return This object.
294       */
295      public SELF collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat value) {
296         collectionFormat = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
297         return self();
298      }
299
300      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
301      public abstract SELF copy();
302
303      /**
304       * Disable auto-detect namespace usage.
305       *
306       * <p>
307       * Don't detect namespace usage before serialization.
308       *
309       * <p>
310       * If enabled, then the data structure will first be crawled looking for namespaces that will be encountered before
311       * the root element is serialized.
312       *
313       * @return This object.
314       */
315      public SELF disableAutoDetectNamespaces() {
316         return disableAutoDetectNamespaces(true);
317      }
318
319      /**
320       * Disable auto-detect namespace usage.
321       *
322       * <p>
323       * Don't detect namespace usage before serialization.
324       *
325       * <p>
326       * If enabled, then the data structure will first be crawled looking for namespaces that will be encountered before
327       * the root element is serialized.
328       *
329       * @param value
330       *    The new value for this setting.
331       * @return This object.
332       */
333      public SELF disableAutoDetectNamespaces(boolean value) {
334         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = value;
335         return self();
336      }
337
338      /**
339       * Disable reuse of XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
340       *
341       * <p>
342       * When enabled, namespaces defined using {@link XmlNs @XmlNs} and {@link Xml Xml} will not be
343       * inherited by the RDF serializers.
344       * Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using {@link RdfNs @RdfNs} and {@link Rdf @Rdf}.
345       *
346       * @return This object.
347       */
348      public SELF disableUseXmlNamespaces() {
349         return disableUseXmlNamespaces(true);
350      }
351
352      /**
353       * Disable reuse of XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
354       *
355       * <p>
356       * When enabled, namespaces defined using {@link XmlNs @XmlNs} and {@link Xml Xml} will not be
357       * inherited by the RDF serializers.
358       * Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using {@link RdfNs @RdfNs} and {@link Rdf @Rdf}.
359       *
360       * @param value
361       *    The new value for this setting.
362       * @return This object.
363       */
364      public SELF disableUseXmlNamespaces(boolean value) {
365         disableUseXmlNamespaces = value;
366         return self();
367      }
368
369      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
370      public HashKey hashKey() {
371         // @formatter:off
372         return HashKey.of(
373            super.hashKey(),
374            addBeanTypesRdf,
375            addLiteralTypes,
376            addRootProperty,
377            disableAutoDetectNamespaces,
378            disableUseXmlNamespaces,
379            looseCollections,
380            language,
381            collectionFormat,
382            juneauNs,
383            juneauBpNs,
384            namespaces,
385            jenaSettings
386         );
387         // @formatter:on
388      }
389
390      /**
391       * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
392       *
393       * @param value
394       *    The new value for this setting.
395       *    <br>The default is <code>{j:<js>'http://www.apache.org/juneaubp/'</js>}</code>.
396       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
397       * @return This object.
398       */
399      public SELF juneauBpNs(Namespace value) {
400         juneauBpNs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
401         return self();
402      }
403
404      /**
405       * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
406       *
407       * @param value
408       *    The new value for this setting.
409       *    <br>The default is <code>{j:<js>'http://www.apache.org/juneau/'</js>}</code>.
410       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
411       * @return This object.
412       */
413      public SELF juneauNs(Namespace value) {
414         juneauNs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
415         return self();
416      }
417
418      /**
419       * RDF language.
420       *
421       * <p>
422       * Can be any of the following:
423       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
424       *    <li>
425       *       <js>"RDF/XML"</js>
426       *    <li>
427       *       <js>"RDF/XML-ABBREV"</js> (default)
428       *    <li>
429       *       <js>"N-TRIPLE"</js>
430       *    <li>
431       *       <js>"N3"</js> - General name for the N3 writer.
432       *       Will make a decision on exactly which writer to use (pretty writer, plain writer or simple writer) when
433       *       created.
434       *       Default is the pretty writer but can be overridden with system property
435       *       <c>org.apache.jena.n3.N3JenaWriter.writer</c>.
436       *    <li>
437       *       <js>"N3-PP"</js> - Name of the N3 pretty writer.
438       *       The pretty writer uses a frame-like layout, with prefixing, clustering like properties and embedding
439       *       one-referenced bNodes.
440       *    <li>
441       *       <js>"N3-PLAIN"</js> - Name of the N3 plain writer.
442       *       The plain writer writes records by subject.
443       *    <li>
444       *       <js>"N3-TRIPLES"</js> - Name of the N3 triples writer.
445       *       This writer writes one line per statement, like N-Triples, but does N3-style prefixing.
446       *    <li>
447       *       <js>"TURTLE"</js> -  Turtle writer.
448       *       http://www.dajobe.org/2004/01/turtle/
449       * </ul>
450       *
451       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
452       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #n3()}
453       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #ntriple()}
454       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #turtle()}
455       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #xml()}
456       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #xmlabbrev()}
457       * </ul>
458       *
459       * @param value
460       *    The new value for this setting.
461       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
462       * @return This object.
463       */
464      public SELF language(String value) {
465         language = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
466         return self();
467      }
468
469      /**
470       * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
471       *
472       * <p>
473       * When specified, collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
474       * resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
475       *
476       * <p>
477       * Note that this setting is specialized for RDF syntax, and is incompatible with the concept of
478       * losslessly representing POJO models, since the tree structure of these POJO models are lost
479       * when serialized as loose collections.
480       *
481       * <p>
482       * This setting is typically only useful if the beans being parsed into do not have a bean property
483       * annotated with {@link Rdf#beanUri @Rdf(beanUri=true)}.
484       *
485       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
486       * <p class='bjava'>
487       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = RdfSerializer
488       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
489       *       .xmlabbrev()
490       *       .looseCollections()
491       *       .build();
492       *
493       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = RdfParser
494       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
495       *       .xml()
496       *       .looseCollections()
497       *       .build();
498       *
499       *    List&lt;MyBean&gt; <jv>list</jv> = <jsm>createListOfMyBeans</jsm>();
500       *
501       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
502       *    String <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
503       *
504       *    <jc>// Parse back into a Java collection</jc>
505       *    <jv>list</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
506       *
507       *    MyBean[] <jv>beans</jv> = <jsm>createArrayOfMyBeans</jsm>();
508       *
509       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
510       *    <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>beans</jv>);
511       *
512       *    <jc>// Parse back into a bean array</jc>
513       *    <jv>beans</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, MyBean[].<jk>class</jk>);
514       * </p>
515       *
516       * @return This object.
517       */
518      public SELF looseCollections() {
519         return looseCollections(true);
520      }
521
522      /**
523       * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
524       *
525       * <p>
526       * When specified, collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
527       * resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
528       *
529       * <p>
530       * Note that this setting is specialized for RDF syntax, and is incompatible with the concept of
531       * losslessly representing POJO models, since the tree structure of these POJO models are lost
532       * when serialized as loose collections.
533       *
534       * <p>
535       * This setting is typically only useful if the beans being parsed into do not have a bean property
536       * annotated with {@link Rdf#beanUri @Rdf(beanUri=true)}.
537       *
538       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
539       * <p class='bjava'>
540       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = RdfSerializer
541       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
542       *       .xmlabbrev()
543       *       .looseCollections()
544       *       .build();
545       *
546       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = RdfParser
547       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
548       *       .xml()
549       *       .looseCollections()
550       *       .build();
551       *
552       *    List&lt;MyBean&gt; <jv>list</jv> = <jsm>createListOfMyBeans</jsm>();
553       *
554       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
555       *    String <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
556       *
557       *    <jc>// Parse back into a Java collection</jc>
558       *    <jv>list</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
559       *
560       *    MyBean[] <jv>beans</jv> = <jsm>createArrayOfMyBeans</jsm>();
561       *
562       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
563       *    <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>beans</jv>);
564       *
565       *    <jc>// Parse back into a bean array</jc>
566       *    <jv>beans</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, MyBean[].<jk>class</jk>);
567       * </p>
568       *
569       * @param value
570       *    The new value for this setting.
571       * @return This object.
572       */
573      public SELF looseCollections(boolean value) {
574         looseCollections = value;
575         return self();
576      }
577
578      /**
579       * RDF language.
580       *
581       * <p>
582       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_N3</jsf>)</code>
583       *
584       * @return This object.
585       */
586      public SELF n3() {
587         return language(Constants.LANG_N3);
588      }
589
590      /**
591       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableAbbrevBaseURI</c>.
592       *
593       * <p>
594       * Controls whether to use abbreviations <c>&lt;&gt;</c> or <c>&lt;#&gt;</c>.
595       *
596       * @return This object.
597       */
598      public SELF n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri() {
599         return n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(true);
600      }
601
602      /**
603       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableAbbrevBaseURI</c>.
604       *
605       * <p>
606       * Controls whether to use abbreviations <c>&lt;&gt;</c> or <c>&lt;#&gt;</c>.
607       *
608       * @param value
609       *    The new value for this setting.
610       * @return This object.
611       */
612      public SELF n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(boolean value) {
613         return jena("n3.disableAbbrevBaseUri", value);
614      }
615
616      /**
617       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableObjectLists</c>.
618       *
619       * <p>
620       * Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.
621       *
622       * @return This object.
623       */
624      public SELF n3_disableObjectLists() {
625         return n3_disableObjectLists(true);
626      }
627
628      /**
629       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableObjectLists</c>.
630       *
631       * <p>
632       * Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.
633       *
634       * @param value
635       *    The new value for this setting.
636       * @return This object.
637       */
638      public SELF n3_disableObjectLists(boolean value) {
639         return jena("n3.disableObjectLists", value);
640      }
641
642      /**
643       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseDoubles</c>.
644       *
645       * <p>
646       * Disallow the use of doubles as <c>123.456</c>.
647       *
648       * @return This object.
649       */
650      public SELF n3_disableUseDoubles() {
651         return n3_disableUseDoubles(true);
652      }
653
654      /**
655       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseDoubles</c>.
656       *
657       * <p>
658       * Disallow the use of doubles as <c>123.456</c>.
659       *
660       * @param value
661       *    The new value for this setting.
662       * @return This object.
663       */
664      public SELF n3_disableUseDoubles(boolean value) {
665         return jena("n3.disableUseDoubles", value);
666      }
667
668      /**
669       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUsePropertySymbols</c>.
670       *
671       * <p>
672       * Controls whether to use <c>a</c>, <c>=</c> and <c>=&gt;</c> in output
673       *
674       * @return This object.
675       */
676      public SELF n3_disableUsePropertySymbols() {
677         return n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(true);
678      }
679
680      /**
681       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUsePropertySymbols</c>.
682       *
683       * <p>
684       * Controls whether to use <c>a</c>, <c>=</c> and <c>=&gt;</c> in output
685       *
686       * @param value
687       *    The new value for this setting.
688       * @return This object.
689       */
690      public SELF n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(boolean value) {
691         return jena("n3.disableUsePropertySymbols", value);
692      }
693
694      /**
695       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseTripleQuotedStrings</c>.
696       *
697       * <p>
698       * Disallow the use of <c>"""</c> to delimit long strings.
699       *
700       * @return This object.
701       */
702      public SELF n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings() {
703         return n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(true);
704      }
705
706      /**
707       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseTripleQuotedStrings</c>.
708       *
709       * <p>
710       * Disallow the use of <c>"""</c> to delimit long strings.
711       *
712       * @param value
713       *    The new value for this setting.
714       * @return This object.
715       */
716      public SELF n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(boolean value) {
717         return jena("n3.disableUseTripleQuotedStrings", value);
718      }
719
720      /**
721       * N3/Turtle property: <c>indentProperty</c>.
722       *
723       * <p>
724       * Width to indent properties.
725       *
726       * @param value
727       *    The new value for this setting.
728       * @return This object.
729       */
730      public SELF n3_indentProperty(int value) {
731         return jena("n3.indentProperty", value);
732      }
733
734      /**
735       * N3/Turtle property: <c>minGap</c>.
736       *
737       * <p>
738       * Minimum gap between items on a line.
739       *
740       * @param value
741       *    The new value for this setting.
742       * @return This object.
743       */
744      public SELF n3_minGap(int value) {
745         return jena("n3.minGap", value);
746      }
747
748      /**
749       * N3/Turtle property: <c>propertyColumn</c>.
750       *
751       * <p>
752       * Width of the property column.
753       *
754       * @param value
755       *    The new value for this setting.
756       * @return This object.
757       */
758      public SELF n3_propertyColumn(int value) {
759         return jena("n3.propertyColumn", value);
760      }
761
762      /**
763       * N3/Turtle property: <c>subjectColumn</c>.
764       *
765       * <p>
766       * If the subject is shorter than this value, the first property may go on the same line.
767       *
768       * @param value
769       *    The new value for this setting.
770       * @return This object.
771       */
772      public SELF n3_subjectColumn(int value) {
773         return jena("n3.subjectColumn", value);
774      }
775
776      /**
777       * N3/Turtle property: <c>widePropertyLen</c>.
778       *
779       * <p>
780       * Width of the property column.
781       * Must be longer than <c>propertyColumn</c>.
782       *
783       * @param value
784       *    The new value for this setting.
785       * @return This object.
786       */
787      public SELF n3_widePropertyLen(int value) {
788         return jena("n3.widePropertyLen", value);
789      }
790
791      /**
792       * Default namespaces.
793       *
794       * <p>
795       * The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
796       *
797       * @param values The new value for this setting.
798       *    <br>Cannot contain <jk>null</jk> values (will throw {@link IllegalArgumentException}).
799       * @return This object.
800       */
801      public SELF namespaces(Namespace...values) {
802         assertArgNoNulls(ARG_values, values);
803         namespaces = addAll(namespaces, values);
804         return self();
805      }
806
807      /**
808       * RDF language.
809       *
810       * <p>
811       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_NTRIPLE</jsf>)</code>
812       *
813       * @return This object.
814       */
815      public SELF ntriple() {
816         return language(Constants.LANG_NTRIPLE);
817      }
818
819      /**
820       * RDF/XML property: <c>allowBadURIs</c>.
821       *
822       * <p>
823       * URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.
824       *
825       * @return This object.
826       */
827      public SELF rdfxml_allowBadUris() {
828         return rdfxml_allowBadUris(true);
829      }
830
831      /**
832       * RDF/XML property: <c>allowBadURIs</c>.
833       *
834       * <p>
835       * URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.
836       *
837       * @param value
838       *    The new value for this setting.
839       * @return This object.
840       */
841      public SELF rdfxml_allowBadUris(boolean value) {
842         return jena("rdfXml.allowBadURIs", value);
843      }
844
845      /**
846       * RDF/XML property: <c>attributeQuoteChar</c>.
847       *
848       * <p>
849       * The XML attribute quote character.
850       *
851       * @param value
852       *    The new value for this setting.
853       * @return This object.
854       */
855      public SELF rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(char value) {
856         return jena("rdfXml.attributeQuoteChar", value);
857      }
858
859      /**
860       * RDF/XML property: <c>blockRules</c>.
861       *
862       * <p>
863       * A list of <c>Resource</c> or a <c>String</c> being a comma separated list of fragment IDs from
864       * {doc http://www.w3.org/TR/rdf-syntax-grammar RDF Syntax Grammar} indicating grammar
865       * rules that will not be used.
866       *
867       * @param value
868       *    The new value for this setting.
869       * @return This object.
870       */
871      public SELF rdfxml_blockRules(String value) {
872         return jena("rdfXml.blockRules", value);
873      }
874
875      /**
876       * RDF/XML property: <c>disableShowDoctypeDeclaration</c>.
877       *
878       * <p>
879       * If disabled, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
880       * This declaration includes a <c>!ENTITY</c> declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any
881       * attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity
882       * invocation.
883       *
884       * @return This object.
885       */
886      public SELF rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration() {
887         return rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(true);
888      }
889
890      /**
891       * RDF/XML property: <c>disableShowDoctypeDeclaration</c>.
892       *
893       * <p>
894       * If disabled, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
895       * This declaration includes a <c>!ENTITY</c> declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any
896       * attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity
897       * invocation.
898       *
899       * @param value
900       *    The new value for this setting.
901       * @return This object.
902       */
903      public SELF rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(boolean value) {
904         return jena("rdfXml.disableShowDoctypeDeclaration", value);
905      }
906
907      /**
908       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
909       *
910       * <p>
911       * Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.
912       *
913       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
914       *    <li>
915       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
916       * </ul>
917       *
918       * @return This object.
919       */
920      public SELF rdfxml_embedding() {
921         return rdfxml_embedding(true);
922      }
923
924      /**
925       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
926       *
927       * <p>
928       * Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.
929       *
930       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
931       *    <li>
932       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
933       * </ul>
934       *
935       * @param value
936       *    The new value for this setting.
937       * @return This object.
938       */
939      public SELF rdfxml_embedding(boolean value) {
940         return jena("rdfXml.embedding", value);
941      }
942
943      /**
944       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
945       *
946       * <p>
947       * This allows a coarse-grained approach to control of error handling.
948       *
949       * <ul class='values'>
950       *    <li><js>"default"</js>
951       *    <li><js>"lax"</js>
952       *    <li><js>"strict"</js>
953       *    <li><js>"strict-ignore"</js>
954       *    <li><js>"strict-warning"</js>
955       *    <li><js>"strict-error"</js>
956       *    <li><js>"strict-fatal"</js>
957       * </ul>
958       *
959       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
960       *    <li>
961       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setDefaultErrorMode() ARPOptions.setDefaultErrorMode()}
962       *    <li>
963       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setLaxErrorMode() ARPOptions.setLaxErrorMode()}
964       *    <li>
965       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode() ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode()}
966       *    <li>
967       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode(int) ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode(int)}
968       * </ul>
969       *
970       * @param value
971       *    The new value for this setting.
972       * @return This object.
973       */
974      public SELF rdfxml_errorMode(String value) {
975         return jena("rdfXml.error-mode", value);
976      }
977
978      /**
979       * RDF/XML property: <c>iri_rules</c>.
980       *
981       * <p>
982       * Set the engine for checking and resolving.
983       *
984       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
985       *    <li>
986       *       <js>"lax"</js> - The rules for RDF URI references only, which does permit spaces although the use of spaces
987       *       is not good practice.
988       *    <li>
989       *       <js>"strict"</js> - Sets the IRI engine with rules for valid IRIs, XLink and RDF; it does not permit spaces
990       *       in IRIs.
991       *    <li>
992       *       <js>"iri"</js> - Sets the IRI engine to IRI
993       *       ({doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3986.txt RFC 3986},
994       *       {doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3987.txt RFC 3987}).
995       * </ul>
996       *
997       * @param value
998       *    The new value for this setting.
999       * @return This object.
1000       */
1001      public SELF rdfxml_iriRules(String value) {
1002         return jena("rdfXml.iri-rules", value);
1003      }
1004
1005      /**
1006       * RDF/XML property: <c>longId</c>.
1007       *
1008       * <p>
1009       * Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
1010       * Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.
1011       *
1012       * @return This object.
1013       */
1014      public SELF rdfxml_longId() {
1015         return rdfxml_longId(true);
1016      }
1017
1018      /**
1019       * RDF/XML property: <c>longId</c>.
1020       *
1021       * <p>
1022       * Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
1023       * Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.
1024       *
1025       * @param value
1026       *    The new value for this setting.
1027       * @return This object.
1028       */
1029      public SELF rdfxml_longId(boolean value) {
1030         return jena("rdfXml.longId", value);
1031      }
1032
1033      /**
1034       * RDF/XML property: <c>relativeURIs</c>.
1035       *
1036       * <p>
1037       * What sort of relative URIs should be used.
1038       *
1039       * <p>
1040       * A comma separate list of options:
1041       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
1042       *    <li>
1043       *       <js>"same-document"</js> - Same-document references (e.g. <js>""</js> or <js>"#foo"</js>)
1044       *    <li>
1045       *       <js>"network"</js>  - Network paths (e.g. <js>"//example.org/foo"</js> omitting the URI scheme)
1046       *    <li>
1047       *       <js>"absolute"</js> - Absolute paths (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js> omitting the scheme and authority)
1048       *    <li>
1049       *       <js>"relative"</js> - Relative path not beginning in <js>"../"</js>
1050       *    <li>
1051       *       <js>"parent"</js> - Relative path beginning in <js>"../"</js>
1052       *    <li>
1053       *       <js>"grandparent"</js> - Relative path beginning in <js>"../../"</js>
1054       * </ul>
1055       *
1056       * <p>
1057       * The default value is <js>"same-document, absolute, relative, parent"</js>.
1058       * To switch off relative URIs use the value <js>""</js>.
1059       * Relative URIs of any of these types are output where possible if and only if the option has been specified.
1060       *
1061       * @param value
1062       *    The new value for this setting.
1063       * @return This object.
1064       */
1065      public SELF rdfxml_relativeUris(String value) {
1066         return jena("rdfXml.relativeURIs", value);
1067      }
1068
1069      /**
1070       * RDF/XML property: <c>showXmlDeclaration</c>.
1071       *
1072       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
1073       *    <li>
1074       *       <js>"true"</js> - Add XML Declaration to the output.
1075       *    <li>
1076       *       <js>"false"</js> - Don't add XML Declaration to the output.
1077       *    <li>
1078       *       <js>"default"</js> - Only add an XML Declaration when asked to write to an <c>OutputStreamWriter</c>
1079       *       that uses some encoding other than <c>UTF-8</c> or <c>UTF-16</c>.
1080       *       In this case the encoding is shown in the XML declaration.
1081       * </ul>
1082       *
1083       * @param value
1084       *    The new value for this setting.
1085       * @return This object.
1086       */
1087      public SELF rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(String value) {
1088         return jena("rdfXml.showXmlDeclaration", value);
1089      }
1090
1091      /**
1092       * RDF/XML property: <c>tab</c>.
1093       *
1094       * <p>
1095       * The number of spaces with which to indent XML child elements.
1096       *
1097       * @param value
1098       *    The new value for this setting.
1099       * @return This object.
1100       */
1101      public SELF rdfxml_tab(int value) {
1102         return jena("rdfXml.tab", value);
1103      }
1104
1105      /**
1106       * RDF/XML property: <c>xmlbase</c>.
1107       *
1108       * <p>
1109       * The value to be included for an <xa>xml:base</xa> attribute on the root element in the file.
1110       *
1111       * @param value
1112       *    The new value for this setting.
1113       * @return This object.
1114       */
1115      public SELF rdfxml_xmlbase(String value) {
1116         return jena("rdfXml.xmlbase", value);
1117      }
1118
1119      /**
1120       * RDF language.
1121       *
1122       * <p>
1123       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TURTLE</jsf>)</code>
1124       *
1125       * @return This object.
1126       */
1127      public SELF turtle() {
1128         return language(Constants.LANG_TURTLE);
1129      }
1130
1131      /**
1132       * RDF language.
1133       *
1134       * <p>
1135       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_JSONLD</jsf>)</code>
1136       *
1137       * @return This object.
1138       */
1139      public SELF jsonLd() {
1140         return language(Constants.LANG_JSONLD);
1141      }
1142
1143      /**
1144       * RDF language.
1145       *
1146       * <p>
1147       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_NQUADS</jsf>)</code>
1148       *
1149       * @return This object.
1150       */
1151      public SELF nQuads() {
1152         return language(Constants.LANG_NQUADS);
1153      }
1154
1155      /**
1156       * RDF language.
1157       *
1158       * <p>
1159       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TRIG</jsf>)</code>
1160       *
1161       * @return This object.
1162       */
1163      public SELF triG() {
1164         return language(Constants.LANG_TRIG);
1165      }
1166
1167      /**
1168       * RDF language.
1169       *
1170       * <p>
1171       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TRIX</jsf>)</code>
1172       *
1173       * @return This object.
1174       */
1175      public SELF triX() {
1176         return language(Constants.LANG_TRIX);
1177      }
1178
1179      /**
1180       * RDF language.
1181       *
1182       * <p>
1183       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDFJSON</jsf>)</code>
1184       *
1185       * @return This object.
1186       */
1187      public SELF rdfJson() {
1188         return language(Constants.LANG_RDFJSON);
1189      }
1190
1191
1192      /**
1193       * RDF language.
1194       *
1195       * <p>
1196       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDF_XML</jsf>)</code>
1197       *
1198       * @return This object.
1199       */
1200      public SELF xml() {
1201         return language(Constants.LANG_RDF_XML);
1202      }
1203
1204      /**
1205       * RDF language.
1206       *
1207       * <p>
1208       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV</jsf>)</code>
1209       *
1210       * @return This object.
1211       */
1212      public SELF xmlabbrev() {
1213         return language(Constants.LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV);
1214      }
1215
1216      SELF jena(String key, Object value) {
1217         jenaSettings.put(key, value);
1218         return self();
1219      }
1220   }
1221
1222   /**
1223    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link RdfSerializer#create()} / {@link RdfSerializer#copy()} path.
1224    */
1225   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
1226
1227      DefaultBuilder() {}
1228
1229      DefaultBuilder(RdfSerializer copyFrom) {
1230         super(copyFrom);
1231      }
1232
1233      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
1234         super(copyFrom);
1235      }
1236
1237      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
1238      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
1239         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
1240      }
1241   }
1242
1243   private static final Namespace[] EMPTY_NAMESPACE_ARRAY = new Namespace[0];
1244
1245   /**
1246    * Creates a new builder for this object.
1247    *
1248    * @return A new builder.
1249    */
1250   @SuppressWarnings({
1251      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
1252   })
1253   public static Builder<?> create() {
1254      return new DefaultBuilder();
1255   }
1256
1257   private static String getAccept(Builder<?> builder) {
1258      if (nn(builder.getAccept()))
1259         return builder.getAccept();
1260      return switch (builder.language) {
1261         case "RDF/XML" -> "text/xml+rdf+abbrev";
1262         case LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV -> "text/xml+rdf+abbrev,text/xml+rdf;q=0.9";
1263         case "N-TRIPLE" -> "text/n-triple";
1264         case "N3" -> "text/n3";
1265         case "N3-PP" -> "text/n3-pp";
1266         case "N3-PLAIN" -> "text/n3-plain";
1267         case "N3-TRIPLES" -> "text/n3-triples";
1268         case "TURTLE" -> "text/turtle";
1269         case "JSON-LD" -> "application/ld+json";
1270         case "N-QUADS" -> "application/n-quads";
1271         case "TRIG" -> "application/trig";
1272         case "TRIX" -> "application/trix+xml";
1273         case "RDF/JSON" -> "application/rdf+json";
1274         default -> MT_TEXT_XML_RDF;
1275      };
1276   }
1277
1278   private static String getProduces(Builder<?> builder) {
1279      if (nn(builder.getProduces()))
1280         return builder.getProduces();
1281      return switch (builder.language) {
1282         case "RDF/XML" -> "text/xml+rdf+abbrev";
1283         case LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV -> MT_TEXT_XML_RDF;
1284         case "N-TRIPLE" -> "text/n-triple";
1285         case "N3" -> "text/n3";
1286         case "N3-PP" -> "text/n3-pp";
1287         case "N3-PLAIN" -> "text/n3-plain";
1288         case "N3-TRIPLES" -> "text/n3-triples";
1289         case "TURTLE" -> "text/turtle";
1290         case "JSON-LD" -> "application/ld+json";
1291         case "N-QUADS" -> "application/n-quads";
1292         case "TRIG" -> "application/trig";
1293         case "TRIX" -> "application/trix+xml";
1294         case "RDF/JSON" -> "application/rdf+json";
1295         default -> MT_TEXT_XML_RDF;
1296      };
1297   }
1298
1299   protected final boolean addBeanTypesRdf;
1300   protected final boolean addLiteralTypes;
1301   protected final boolean addRootProperty;
1302   protected final boolean autoDetectNamespaces;
1303   protected final boolean looseCollections;
1304   protected final boolean useXmlNamespaces;
1305   protected final Namespace juneauBpNs;
1306   protected final Namespace juneauNs;
1307   protected final RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat;
1308   protected final String language;
1309
1310   final Map<String,Object> jenaSettings;
1311   final Namespace[] namespaces;
1312   private final boolean addBeanTypesEffective;
1313   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,RdfClassMeta> rdfClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1314
1315   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,RdfBeanMeta> rdfBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1316   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,RdfBeanPropertyMeta> rdfBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1317   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,XmlClassMeta> xmlClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1318
1319   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,XmlBeanMeta> xmlBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1320
1321   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,XmlBeanPropertyMeta> xmlBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1322
1323   /**
1324    * Constructor.
1325    *
1326    * @param builder
1327    *    The builder for this object.
1328    */
1329   public RdfSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
1330      super(builder.produces(getProduces(builder)).accept(getAccept(builder)));
1331      addLiteralTypes = builder.addLiteralTypes;
1332      addRootProperty = builder.addRootProperty;
1333      useXmlNamespaces = ! builder.disableUseXmlNamespaces;
1334      looseCollections = builder.looseCollections;
1335      autoDetectNamespaces = ! builder.disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
1336      language = builder.language;
1337      juneauNs = builder.juneauNs;
1338      juneauBpNs = builder.juneauBpNs;
1339      collectionFormat = builder.collectionFormat;
1340      namespaces = nn(builder.namespaces) ? builder.namespaces.toArray(EMPTY_NAMESPACE_ARRAY) : EMPTY_NAMESPACE_ARRAY;
1341      addBeanTypesRdf = builder.addBeanTypesRdf;
1342      jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(builder.jenaSettings);
1343
1344      addBeanTypesEffective = addBeanTypesRdf || super.isAddBeanTypes();
1345   }
1346
1347   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1348   public Builder<?> copy() {
1349      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
1350   }
1351
1352   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1353   public RdfSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
1354      return RdfSerializerSession.create(this);
1355   }
1356
1357   /**
1358    * Default namespaces.
1359    *
1360    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#namespaces(Namespace...)
1361    * @return
1362    *    The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
1363    */
1364   public Namespace[] getNamespaces() { return namespaces; }
1365
1366   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1367   public RdfBeanMeta getRdfBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
1368      return rdfBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new RdfBeanMeta(k, this));
1369   }
1370
1371   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1372   public RdfBeanPropertyMeta getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
1373      return rdfBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new RdfBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
1374   }
1375
1376   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1377   public RdfClassMeta getRdfClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1378      return rdfClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new RdfClassMeta(k, this));
1379   }
1380
1381   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1382   public RdfSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
1383
1384   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1385   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
1386      return xmlBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new XmlBeanMeta(k, this));
1387   }
1388
1389   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1390   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
1391      return xmlBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new XmlBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
1392   }
1393
1394   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1395   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1396      return xmlClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new XmlClassMeta(k, this));
1397   }
1398
1399   /**
1400    * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
1401    *
1402    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat)
1403    * @return
1404    *    RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
1405    */
1406   protected final RdfCollectionFormat getCollectionFormat() { return collectionFormat; }
1407
1408   /**
1409    * All Jena-related configuration properties.
1410    *
1411    * @return
1412    *    A map of all Jena-related configuration properties.
1413    */
1414   protected final Map<String,Object> getJenaSettings() { return jenaSettings; }
1415
1416   /**
1417    * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
1418    *
1419    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#juneauBpNs(Namespace)
1420    * @return
1421    *    The XML namespace to use for bean properties.
1422    */
1423   protected final Namespace getJuneauBpNs() { return juneauBpNs; }
1424
1425   /**
1426    * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
1427    *
1428    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#juneauNs(Namespace)
1429    * @return
1430    *    The XML namespace to use for Juneau properties.
1431    */
1432   protected final Namespace getJuneauNs() { return juneauNs; }
1433
1434   /**
1435    * RDF language.
1436    *
1437    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#language(String)
1438    * @return
1439    *    The RDF language to use.
1440    */
1441   protected final String getLanguage() { return language; }
1442
1443   /**
1444    * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
1445    *
1446    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()
1447    * @return
1448    *    <jk>true</jk> if <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
1449    *    through reflection.
1450    */
1451   @Override
1452   protected final boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return addBeanTypesEffective; }
1453
1454   /**
1455    * Add XSI data types to non-<c>String</c> literals.
1456    *
1457    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#addLiteralTypes()
1458    * @return
1459    *    <jk>true</jk> if XSI data types should be added to string literals.
1460    */
1461   protected final boolean isAddLiteralTypes() { return addLiteralTypes; }
1462
1463   /**
1464    * Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
1465    *
1466    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#addRootProperty()
1467    * @return
1468    *    <jk>true</jk> if RDF property <c>http://www.apache.org/juneau/root</c> is added with a value of <js>"true"</js>
1469    *    to identify the root node in the graph.
1470    */
1471   protected final boolean isAddRootProp() { return addRootProperty; }
1472
1473   /**
1474    * Auto-detect namespace usage.
1475    *
1476    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#disableAutoDetectNamespaces()
1477    * @return
1478    *    <jk>true</jk> if namespaces usage should be detected before serialization.
1479    */
1480   protected final boolean isAutoDetectNamespaces() { return autoDetectNamespaces; }
1481
1482   /**
1483    * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
1484    *
1485    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#looseCollections()
1486    * @return
1487    *    <jk>true</jk> if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
1488    *    resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
1489    */
1490   protected final boolean isLooseCollections() { return looseCollections; }
1491
1492   /**
1493    * Reuse XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
1494    *
1495    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#disableUseXmlNamespaces()
1496    * @return
1497    *    <jk>true</jk> if namespaces defined using {@link XmlNs @XmlNs} and {@link Xml @Xml} will be inherited by the RDF serializers.
1498    *    <br>Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using {@link RdfNs @RdfNs} and {@link Rdf @Rdf}.
1499    */
1500   protected final boolean isUseXmlNamespaces() { return useXmlNamespaces; }
1501
1502   @Override /* Overridden from WriterSerializer */
1503   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
1504      return super.properties()
1505         .a(PROP_addBeanTypes, addBeanTypes)
1506         .a(PROP_addLiteralTypes, addLiteralTypes)
1507         .a(PROP_addRootProperty, addRootProperty)
1508         .a(PROP_autoDetectNamespaces, autoDetectNamespaces)
1509         .a(PROP_collectionFormat, collectionFormat)
1510         .a(PROP_juneauBpNs, juneauBpNs)
1511         .a(PROP_juneauNs, juneauNs)
1512         .a(PROP_language, language)
1513         .a(PROP_looseCollections, looseCollections)
1514         .a(PROP_namespaces, namespaces)
1515         .a(PROP_useXmlNamespaces, useXmlNamespaces);
1516   }
1517}
